name: SetupGitHubRelease
description: Downloads and installs a binary from the latest GitHub release and adds it to PATH.
helpMarkDown: Matches release assets by platform and architecture, downloads, extracts, locates the binary, caches it, and prepends its directory to PATH.
author: Slawomir Koszewski

inputs.name: fileName
inputs.label: File Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Asset name or regex prefixed with ~.

inputs.name: binaryName
inputs.label: Binary Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Binary name or regex prefixed with ~. Defaults to repository name.

inputs.name: fileType
inputs.label: File Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: archive, package, or custom regex pattern for file extension matching.

inputs.name: updateCache
inputs.label: Update Cache
inputs.helpMarkDown: false: use any cached version. true: use current latest release and cache if needed. always: always download latest and refresh cache.

inputs.name: debug
inputs.label: Debug
inputs.helpMarkDown: Logs discovered files while searching for the binary.

inputs.name: token
inputs.label: GitHub Token
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional GitHub token for private repos or higher API limits. If empty, uses GITHUB_TOKEN if available.
